positive: A minimalist, high-contrast silhouette of a majestic grizzly bear paw print nestled among stylized mountains and pine trees. The style should be inspired by vintage botanical etchings and modern woodcut illustrations, rendered with clean, crisp lines and strong negative space. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, charcoal black, and off-white cream. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, making it ideal for placement on a t-shirt. The lighting should be flat and graphic, emphasizing the silhouette shapes. The overall mood is wild, robust, and nature-inspired. Vector art quality, high detail, commercial print-ready.
